@startuml
class "AbstractProcess" as AbstractProcess {
}

class "AbstractTCPProcess" as AbstractTCPProcess {
  <<abstract>>
  ◇ requestObject : Request
  ◇ tcpClient : TcpClient
  ◇ networkStream : NetworkStream
  ◇ encode : Encoding
  ◇ socketObserver : SocketObserver
  + AbstractTCPProcess()
  + InitializeInstance(requestObject:Request, tcpClient:TcpClient, networkStream:NetworkStream, encode:Encoding, socketObserver:SocketObserver) : void
}

AbstractProcess <|-- AbstractTCPProcess

note right of AbstractProcess
  C
end note

note right of AbstractTCPProcess
  A
end note

@enduml
